settings.manageAccountBackupsSecurity: Manage your account, backups, and security
settings.emailManagedByAuth: Your email address is managed through your auth provider.
settings.advancedNodeInfo: Advanced: Connect nodes via SSH or TLS for encrypted management.
settings.downloadBackupDescription: Download a complete snapshot of all your projects, including Docker Compose definitions and layout metadata.
settings.cloudSyncDescription: Keep your projects synchronized automatically across your devices using Google Drive.
settings.exportVolumesDescription: Coming soon: Direct export of persistent container data into TAR archives.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: Deleting your account is a permanent action. All your projects, shared links, and deployment configurations will be destroyed immediately. This cannot be undone.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmation: This will destroy the account and all data associated with it.
settings.youWillLoseAllProjects: You will lose all your projects.
settings.deletePhrase: delete my account and loose my data
settings.unexpectedBackupError: An unexpected error occurred during backup

deploy.pleaseRedeployFromPlayground: Please redeploy from Playground to apply new resource limits.
deploy.confirmDeleteProject: Completely delete "{name}"? This will erase all containers and volumes.
deploy.allContainersWillBeRestarted: All containers of "{name}" will be restarted with current configuration and resource limits.
deploy.allContainersWillBeStopped: All containers of "{name}" will be stopped
deploy.confirmPasswordToDelete: Confirm your password to permanently delete "{name}".
deploy.changesTakeEffectAfterReapply: * Changes take effect after Clicking "Reapply" or Redeploying from Playground.

monitor.resourceLimitsDescription: Resource limits define the maximum capacity each container can consume from the host system. Changes require a redeploy to take full effect.
monitor.pleaseRedeploy: Please redeploy from Playground to apply new resource limits.

library.selectServiceToSeeDetails: Select a service to see details
library.browse: Browse and add services to your compose deployment

terminal.typeCommand: Type a command below to execute...
